title: Industry Experts Gather to Discuss AI’s Impact on Banking and Trust. - FinancialEDGE
description: The fourth edition of the Association of Corporate Affairs Managers of Banks (ACAMB) stakeholders conference brought together renowned experts in the communications and financial industry to discuss the theme "AI and The Future of Trust: Reimagining Banking and Financial Services In A Digital First Era". html: The fourth edition of the Association of Corporate Affairs Managers of Banks (ACAMB) stakeholders conference brought together renowned experts in the communications and  financial industry to discuss the theme “AI and The Future of Trust: Reimagining Banking and Financial Services In A Digital First Era”.
